'''Valadon''', a native of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core world]] of [[Mamendin]], was a young [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] identity thief, an expert in her field.

A founding member of the [[Slams|Slam gang]]—a notorious gang of expert thieves made particularly infamous by its heist of the [[Vuma/Legends|Vuma]] treasury—Valadon added to an already flirtatious nature by dressing in a provocative manner.

In [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], in an attempt to apprehend [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] took on the identity of Valadon while serving [[Mission to Romin|undercover]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Romin]].<ref name="JQ:CotG" />

That same year, the ''real'' Valadon was captured and recommitted to [[Prison/Legends|prison]] after an attempted heist with [[Roper Slam]] of a substantial cache of [[Crystalline vertex/Legends|crystalline vertex]]. Their heist, part of a collusion with galactic criminals [[Granta Omega]] and [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], was set to follow the inaugural ceremony of the [[All Planets Relief Fund]] at the [[Bank of the Core Plaza]], immediately before Omega and Zan Arbor's [[Attack on the Senate Building|assassination attempt]] on [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] [[Senate Building/Legends|building]].<ref name="Jedi Quest: The False Peace">''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]''</ref>
